text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, about that losin' streak we've been on
lately...
choice_data_list: Sorry I haven't been much help...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
What? No, no—you ain't got nothin' to apologize
for!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
We're just gettin' started! I'm gonna blast through
my competition and finish first!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: The two of us gotta work together, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
What is it people say here in Japan? Something
about workin' like ya got three feet?
choice_data_list:
Let's take it step by step like it's a three-legged
race.
Let's work together like it's a three-legged race.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yeah, that's it! Let's win this three-legged race!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
If we do our best side by side, I betcha we can
make a lot of folks happy!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Bring it on! Make it extra tough!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I just know everybody'll be happy once I start
winning!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
And I'm bound to get mighty strong with you
beside me, Trainer!
